source: Unreal Engine 5.8 — PetoskeyCivicBowl CivicBowl.umap, Game View captures via the ModelContextProtocol plugin (EditorAppToolset.CaptureViewport)
scene_state: GIS-first nested context build: full OSM+Microsoft city massing with 99% LiDAR-measured (3DEP) building heights, width-graded draped streets, foreground 3DEP terrain, accepted bowl design untouched; crude bay/horizon proxies hidden.
note: These are real perspective renders of the live editor scene, persisted from ephemeral job-tmp so the web viewer can show the latest rendered scene. Refresh by re-capturing from the editor and re-running scripts/build_viewer_renders.py.

frames.01_city_overview.png: City overview — LiDAR-height massing, bowl at centre, Little Traverse Bay beyond
frames.04_bowl_in_context_beards_study.png: Bowl in context — Beards Brewery bay-view obstruction study angle
frames.07_harbor_breakwaters_in_water.png: Harbor — breakwaters + piers now surrounded by water (coast clipped to OSM shoreline; long breakwater carries the pierhead light)
